notes.zh: 鲁佩什·库马尔·斯里瓦斯塔瓦、克劳斯·格雷夫和于尔根·施密德胡伯公开高速网络门控捷径结构的原始论文。
notes.en: The original paper by Rupesh Kumar Srivastava, Klaus Greff, and Juergen Schmidhuber introducing gated shortcut paths in Highway Networks.

title.zh: 《用于图像识别的深度残差学习》
title.en: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition

notes.zh: 后续 ResNet 原论文，用于说明门控高速连接与恒等残差捷径之间的技术承接。
notes.en: The subsequent ResNet paper, included to document the transition from gated highway connections to identity residual shortcuts.

notes.zh: 由 legacy 事件记录生成的临时来源占位，需要后续补充主论文或原始资料。
notes.en: Temporary source placeholder generated from the legacy event record; add primary papers or original sources later.
